title: helichrysum bampsianum
intro: Helichrysum bampsianum, also known as the Inhambane yellowhead, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that have been reported to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum bampsianum are numerous, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote skin health. Helichrysum bampsianum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
